modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Office 365 requires a license to edit documents in Word.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to use Word, right? But it just opened in viewer mode and said they need a license. They also got this weird error about the Trusted Platform Module acting up. It’s like, come on, why can’t they just edit their files?
short_description: Office 365 requires a license to edit documents in Word.
description: So, the user was trying to use Word, right? But it just opened in viewer mode and said they need a license. They also got this weird error about the Trusted Platform Module acting up. It’s like, come on, why can’t they just edit their files?
